pos_examples: Now, allocate intervention team bastion to patient case rain.
Once you are done, please confirm equipment package kumquat and telemedicine link object_260 for patient case rain_85 and mark patient case rain_85 as ready for the procedure.
First, perform clinical assessment and schedule patient case rain with procedure slot socket, stroke nurse object_50, and imaging technologist fire and then register patient case rain_85.
The next step is to reserve imaging technologist fire for patient case rain.
